data.name: Futanari Tales 💕🔞
data.detailed_description:
About the game

Futanari Tales 💕🔞 - this is a game for futanari lovers! If you like power play, strong feminine characters, and deeply flawed people, we're off to a good start! If you also like dominant girls with huge dicks, then we have truly excellent news for you!

About the story

Futanari Tales 💕🔞is a short adult Visual Novel in wich you take control of a young guy. This story takes place in a futuristic world where body modifications and high technology are common place. Because of this, there are a subset of women who choose to have male genitalia attached to their bodies. These cocks and balls can be, and often are, much larger than natural male genitalia. So if you are not interested in futanari/shemale/dickgirl on male action, men getting fucked in the ass, or chastity themes, then this story is not for you. There will be femdom and chastity themes, so be advised. Additionally, this story is a quick piece of smut. If you came for high quality writing or character development, you may want to consider another story.

Features
- HD renders
- Intriguing story
- Explicit scenes
- The story is based on real life
- Can be played with one hand

data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 繁體中文, 簡體中文, 韓文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 土耳其文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo E4700
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD 4000
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 6500
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 750
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
